Interface RenderingContext

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractRenderingContext, OpenGLContext
public interface RenderingContext extends NonThrowingAutoCloseable
Represents a graphics environment. Binds together:
  • a RenderingSurface (where to draw)
  • a Stage (what to draw)
  • a RenderCanvas (how to draw)
Multiple can coexist in one GraphicsManager.

Note: do not manually close instances of this interface retrieved from a GraphicsManager; it does so automatically when needed.

See Also:
  • GraphicsManager.createWindowContext(String, StageCreator)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    This method is not expected to throw any checked exceptions.
    RenderCanvas
    getCanvas()
    Returns the canvas used for drawing operations.
    Stage
    getStage()
    Returns the stage associated with this context.
    RenderingSurface
    getSurface()
    Returns the underlying rendering surface.
    default void
    onResize(RenderingSurface.ResizeListener callback)
    Adds a resize listener to the surface.
    default void
    pollEvents()
    Polls input and system events (e.g., window close, resize, key press) and fires them on the underlying stage's local event dispatcher.
    void
    present()
    Presents the rendered frame.
    default void
    setShouldClose()
    Requests the surface to close; in other words, makes shouldClose() return true on the next call.
    default boolean
    shouldClose()
    Checks if the surface should close and clears this flag.

  • Method Details

    • getSurface

      RenderingSurface getSurface()
      Returns the underlying rendering surface.
      Returns:
      the underlying rendering surface
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if this context is closed (optional)

    • getStage

      Stage getStage()
      Returns the stage associated with this context.
      Returns:
      the stage associated with this context
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if this context is closed (optional)

    • getCanvas

      RenderCanvas getCanvas()
      Returns the canvas used for drawing operations.
      Returns:
      the canvas
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if this context is closed (optional)

    • pollEvents

      default void pollEvents()
      Polls input and system events (e.g., window close, resize, key press) and fires them on the underlying stage's local event dispatcher.

      This method is called regularly from the graphics loop, no need to call it manually.

      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if this context is closed

    • present

      void present()
      Presents the rendered frame.

      This method is called regularly from the graphics loop, no need to call it manually.

      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if this context is closed

    • shouldClose

      default boolean shouldClose()
      Checks if the surface should close and clears this flag.
      Returns:
      whether a close was requested

    • setShouldClose

      default void setShouldClose()
      Requests the surface to close; in other words, makes shouldClose() return true on the next call.

    • onResize

      default void onResize(RenderingSurface.ResizeListener callback)
      Adds a resize listener to the surface.
      Parameters:
      callback - the listener to call every time the surface gets resized

    • close

      void close()
      This method is not expected to throw any checked exceptions.

      Note: contexts must not be closed manually; this is handled by the graphics manager. Use setShouldClose() instead to signal a close request.

      After calling this method, the context instance should not be used. Calling this method more than once does not have any effect.

      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface NonThrowingAutoCloseable
